accuracy.existing_infrastructure: verified — all 8 items confirmed against index.html, src/style.css, and src/visual/resize.ts
accuracy.gaps_identified: valid — overscroll-behavior, touch-action, overlay safe-area padding, and info-close top inset are genuinely missing
accuracy.risk_assessment_confirmed: pointer.ts uses pointermove/pointerenter/pointerleave (pointer events), not touch events — touch-action: none is safe

suggestions.detail: Step 4 code_sketch adds padding to .eavi-info-overlay but the plan also mentions .eavi-info-panel and .eavi-info-close needing safe-area adjustments (files_to_modify bullet points 4 and 5). The implementation_steps don't have explicit steps for those two selectors — fold them into step 4 or add a step so nothing is missed.
canvas rule (line 21-25 of style.css) could also get touch-action: none for completeness, since the plan mentions it in the analysis but step 3 only targets #app.

planReview.verdict: Plan is correct, minimal, CSS-only, and well-scoped. The two low-severity suggestions are minor completeness items. Proceed with implementation.
